emails.subject: What's Going On
emails.body: What's Going On What's happening down in your area? It's very scary. You just don't know what's going to happen! It's a crying shame what's happening to Enron. Who would have ever thought this?

emails.subject: Re: What's Going On
emails.body: Re: What's Going On I hear you my sistah. You are so right...........................however, LIFE IS GOOD. (Smile) From: Patrice L Mims/ENRON@enronXgate on 11/08/2001 10:56 AM

emails.subject: RE: What's Going On
emails.body: RE: What's Going On Are you on Enron's MSN Instant Messenger? Will you be ready at 5 today?

emails.subject: RE: What's Going On
emails.body: Hey Homey, I really do need to leave at 5:00. If anything changes I will let you know. Thanks
